reference: Hi, there is a possibility of a ringworm infection or fungal infection in your case. The only precaution you must follow is not to touch, pinch, pop, or squeeze any of them; otherwise, it can get infected and cause complications. You can apply clotrimazole cream and take the antihistamine loratadine or levocetirizine by mouth.
